source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ CE MDD/■ 3. 3차 CE TCF 보안사항 제출 (12월10일)/08. PMS & PMCF/Vigilance report 2_12-1_rev_08.docx

document.title: MEDDEV 2 12-1 rev. 8 Vigilance
document.documentType: Medical Devices Vigilance System report form annexes

sourceSummary.oneLine: Excerpt from MEDDEV 2.12/1 rev 8 Vigilance containing manufacturer incident, FSCA, FSN, PSR, trend report, and NCA report templates.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides report forms and templates for medical device vigilance reporting to National Competent Authorities and for exchange of information between NCAR participants.
keyPoints: Annex 3 is a Manufacturer’s Incident Report form for the Medical Devices Vigilance System.
Annex 4 is a Manufacturer’s Field Safety Corrective Action Report form.
Annex 5 is a template for an Urgent Field Safety Notice.
Annex 6 is a Manufacturer’s Periodic Summary Report form.
Annex 7 is a Manufacturer’s Trend Report form.
Annex 8 is a National Competent Authority Report format for exchange of medical device information between NCAR participants only.

entities.name: MHRA
entities.evidence: To which NCA(s) is this report being sent? MHRA

entities.name: NCAR participants
entities.evidence: This form should be used for the exchange of medical device information between NCAR participants only.

evidence.claim: The source is from MEDDEV 2.12/1 revision 8 vigilance material.
Annex 3 provides a manufacturer incident report form for the Medical Devices Vigilance System.
evidence.evidenceText: 10.3 ANNEX 3 - REPORT FORM FOR MANUFACTURER’S TO THENATIONAL COMPETENT AUTHORITY ... Manufacturer’s Incident Report Medical Devices Vigilance System (MEDDEV 2.12/1 rev 8)

evidence.claim: The incident report form captures report type, serious public health threat status, and incident classification.
evidence.evidenceText: Type of report Initial report Follow-up report Combined Initial and final report Final report Does the incident represent a serious public health threat? Yes No Classification of incident Death Unanticipated serious deterioration in state of health All other reportable incidents

evidence.claim: The incident report form includes medical device information such as class, nomenclature, commercial name, model number, serial number, software version, manufacturing date, and notified body ID.
evidence.evidenceText: Medical device information Class ... Nomenclature system (preferable GMDN) ... Commercial name/ brand name / make Model number Catalogue number Serial number(s) ... Software version number ... Device Manufacturing date ... Notified Body (NB) ID-number

evidence.claim: Annex 4 provides a manufacturer field safety corrective action report form.
evidence.evidenceText: 10.4 ANNEX 4 - REPORT FORM FOR FIELD SAFETY CORRECTIVE ACTION Report Form Manufacturer’s Field Safety Corrective ActionReport Medical Devices Vigilance System (MEDDEV 2.12/1 rev 8)

evidence.claim: The FSCA report excerpt identifies MHRA as the NCA recipient and 06/30/2017 as the report date.
evidence.evidenceText: To which NCA(s) is this report being sent? MHRA ... Date of this report 06/30/2017

evidence.claim: The FSCA report excerpt identifies DSMAREF CO.,LTD. as the manufacturer.
The FSCA report form includes fields for background, reason, action description, distributor and user advice, progress, FSN attachments, FSN status, schedule, and affected countries.
evidence.evidenceText: 7 Description of FSCA Background information and reason for the FSCA Description and justification of the action ... Advice on actions to be taken by the distributor and the user ... Progress of FSCA ... Field Safety Notice (FSN) in English ... FSN Status Draft Final ... Time schedule ... countries ... affected by this FSCA

evidence.claim: Annex 5 is an urgent field safety notice template.
evidence.evidenceText: 10.5 ANNEX 5 - Template for a Field Safety Notice ... Urgent Field Safety Notice

evidence.claim: The FSN template calls for details on affected devices, description of the problem, user actions, notice transmission, and a contact reference person.
evidence.evidenceText: Details on affected devices ... Description of the problem ... Advise on action to be taken by the user ... Transmission of this Field Safety Notice ... Contact reference person

evidence.claim: Annex 6 provides a manufacturer periodic summary report form.
evidence.evidenceText: 10.6 ANNEX 6 -Manufacturer’s PERIODIC SUMMARY REPORT FORM Report Form Manufacturer’s PeriodicSummary Report (PSR) Medical Devices Vigilance System (MEDDEV 2.12/1 rev 8)

evidence.claim: The PSR form includes PSR type, agreed summary period, incident figures, investigation updates, corrective or preventive actions, recommended actions, and expected next report date.
evidence.evidenceText: PSR Type: Incidents described in a Field Safety Notice ... Common and well documented incidents ... Summary period agreed ... Date of PSR New incidents Total number ... Investigation update for this period Initial corrective actions / preventive actionsimplemented by the manufacturer Recommended actions for this period, if any Expected date of next PSR report

evidence.claim: Annex 7 provides a manufacturer trend report form.
evidence.evidenceText: 10.7 ANNEX 7-MANUFACTURER’S TRENDREPORT FORM Report Form Manufacturer’s Trend Report Medical Devices Vigilance System (MEDDEV 2.12/1 rev 8)

evidence.claim: The trend report form captures date identified, description narrative, analysis period, trigger level, individual vigilance reporting, preliminary analysis, CAPA or FSCA, implementation schedule, and distribution countries.
evidence.evidenceText: Date the trend was identified Description narrative for identified trend Time period of trend analysis Established trigger level Have any of the trended events been submitted individually as reportable events under vigilance? ... Manufacturer’s preliminary analysis into causes of trend Initial corrective actions / preventive actions ... Remedial action / corrective action / preventive action / Field Safety Corrective Action Time scheduled ... The medical device has been distributed to the following Countries

evidence.claim: Annex 8 provides a National Competent Authority report format for exchange between NCAR participants only, not for public release.
evidence.evidenceText: NATIONAL COMPETENT AUTHORITY REPORT This form should be used for the exchange of medical device information between NCAR participants only. Completed forms should not be released to the public.

reviewFlags.reason: No specific product model is filled in the source text; product-related fields are blank report form fields.
Document date is interpreted from the filled FSCA field 'Date of this report 06/30/2017'; no separate publication date is present.
Authority is partly generic because most forms refer to National Competent Authority; MHRA appears only in the filled FSCA report recipient field.
OCR/text extraction contains spacing defects such as 'THENATIONAL', 'ActionReport', and 'PeriodicSummary', but core form content remains readable.
